title: WhatDash
summary: A live-selling analytics dashboard for Whatnot shows with sales tracking, bidder insights, session archives, and realtime stream tools.
details: WhatDash is built around practical live-show analytics: sold tracking, bidder history, revenue summaries, giveaways separated from sales, and show-session archives. The goal is to give sellers the information they need without slowing down fast auctions.

title: Inventory Manager
summary: A local Windows inventory workflow for catalog building, barcode labels, pricing, images, and Static Web Page publishing.
details: This app helps organize Whatnot purchases into searchable categories, calculate target sell prices, manage barcodes, build product catalogs, and publish static storefront files.

title: Trip Planner Experiments
summary: A shared itinerary planner with cute planning flows, draggable day blocks, drive segments, and trip memories.
details: A collaborative trip-planning concept designed for shared adventures, toddler-friendly schedules, route planning, editable timelines, and recap memories.
